entries.sentence: The accountant checked the company's bills.
entries.chinese: accountant = 会计师；会计师核对了公司的账单。

entries.sentence: The actor played a young detective in the film.
entries.chinese: actor = 男演员；这位男演员在电影中扮演一名年轻侦探。

entries.sentence: The actress spoke to the audience after the play.
entries.chinese: actress = 女演员；演出后，这位女演员与观众交谈。

entries.sentence: A local artist painted this picture of the harbour.
entries.chinese: artist = 艺术家；一位当地艺术家画了这幅港口图。

entries.sentence: We collected our train tickets from the booking office.
entries.chinese: booking office = 售票处；我们从售票处取了火车票。

entries.sentence: Her parents started a small food business.
entries.chinese: business = 生意；她父母开创了一家小型食品生意。

entries.sentence: The businessman travelled abroad to meet a customer.
entries.chinese: businessman = 男商人；这位男商人出国去见一位客户。

entries.sentence: The businesswoman opened her first shop at twenty-five.
entries.chinese: businesswoman = 女商人；这位女商人二十五岁时开了第一家店。

entries.sentence: She hopes to have a career in medicine.
entries.chinese: career = 职业生涯；她希望从事医疗工作。

entries.sentence: The chef prepared a special meal for the guests.
entries.chinese: chef = 厨师；厨师为客人们准备了一顿特别的饭菜。

entries.sentence: Send your CV with the job application.
entries.chinese: CV = 简历；请把简历和求职申请一起寄出。

entries.sentence: The dentist checked my teeth and gave me some advice.
entries.chinese: dentist = 牙医；牙医检查了我的牙齿并给了我一些建议。

entries.sentence: The designer created a comfortable school uniform.
entries.chinese: designer = 设计师；设计师设计了一套舒适的校服。

entries.sentence: The doctor examined my injured arm.
entries.chinese: doctor = 医生；医生检查了我受伤的手臂。

entries.sentence: I sent my manager an email about the meeting.
entries.chinese: email = 电子邮件；我给经理发了一封关于会议的电子邮件。

entries.sentence: This factory produces parts for electric cars.
entries.chinese: factory = 工厂；这家工厂生产电动汽车零件。

entries.sentence: The farmer grows vegetables and keeps chickens.
entries.chinese: farmer = 农民；这位农民种蔬菜并养鸡。

entries.sentence: Mia applied for a summer job at the cafe.
entries.chinese: job = 工作；米娅申请了咖啡馆的暑期工作。

entries.sentence: The journalist interviewed the winning athlete.
entries.chinese: journalist = 记者；记者采访了获胜的运动员。

entries.sentence: The lawyer gave the family some legal advice.
entries.chinese: lawyer = 律师；律师给了这家人一些法律建议。

entries.sentence: The mechanic repaired our car this morning.
entries.chinese: mechanic = 修理工；修理工今天早上修好了我们的汽车。

entries.sentence: The nurse checked the patient's temperature.
entries.chinese: nurse = 护士；护士测量了病人的体温。

entries.sentence: My father is in Singapore on business this week.
entries.chinese: on business = 因公；我父亲本周因公在新加坡。

entries.sentence: Jack was out of work for two months.
entries.chinese: out of work = 失业；杰克失业了两个月。

entries.sentence: The pilot landed the plane safely in heavy rain.
entries.chinese: pilot = 飞行员；飞行员在大雨中安全降落了飞机。

entries.sentence: The police are investigating the stolen bicycles.
entries.chinese: police = 警察；警方正在调查自行车失窃案。

entries.sentence: A police officer asked us to move the car.
entries.chinese: police officer = 警察；一名警察让我们把车开走。

entries.sentence: I sent the parcel from the post office.
entries.chinese: post office = 邮局；我从邮局寄出了包裹。

entries.sentence: Teaching is a profession that requires patience.
entries.chinese: profession = 职业；教师是一种需要耐心的职业。

entries.sentence: Ask a professional to repair the broken cooker.
entries.chinese: professional = 专业人士；请专业人士修理坏掉的炉灶。

entries.sentence: The secretary arranged a meeting for Friday.
entries.chinese: secretary = 秘书；秘书安排了星期五的会议。

entries.sentence: The shop assistant helped me find the right size.
entries.chinese: shop assistant = 店员；店员帮我找到了合适的尺码。

entries.sentence: The hotel staff were friendly and helpful.
entries.chinese: staff = 全体员工；酒店员工友好又乐于助人。

entries.sentence: My mother starts work at eight every morning.
entries.chinese: work = 工作；我妈妈每天早上八点开始工作。

entries.sentence: Each factory worker wears a safety helmet.
entries.chinese: worker = 工人；每名工厂工人都戴安全帽。

entries.sentence: We need to work out the total cost of the trip.
entries.chinese: work out = 算出；我们需要算出这次旅行的总费用。

entries.sentence: Admission to the museum is free on Sundays.
entries.chinese: admission = 入场；星期天博物馆免费入场。

entries.sentence: She found the job through an employment agency.
entries.chinese: agency = 中介机构；她通过一家职业介绍机构找到了工作。

entries.sentence: My uncle works for an international software company.
entries.chinese: company = 公司；我叔叔在一家国际软件公司工作。

entries.sentence: Food is an important part of every culture.
entries.chinese: culture = 文化；食物是每种文化的重要组成部分。

entries.sentence: Taking off your shoes indoors is a local custom.
entries.chinese: custom = 风俗；进屋脱鞋是当地的风俗。

entries.sentence: We showed our passports at customs.
entries.chinese: customs = 海关；我们在海关出示了护照。

entries.sentence: The government plans to build a new hospital.
entries.chinese: government = 政府；政府计划建造一家新医院。

entries.sentence: Tourism is an important industry in this region.
entries.chinese: industry = 行业；旅游业是这个地区的重要行业。

entries.sentence: Students from twelve countries attended the international conference.
entries.chinese: international = 国际的；来自十二个国家的学生参加了这场国际会议。

entries.sentence: The law requires drivers to wear seat belts.
entries.chinese: law = 法律；法律要求驾驶员系安全带。

entries.sentence: The national team trained before the match.
entries.chinese: national = 国家的；国家队在比赛前进行了训练。

entries.sentence: The policeman directed traffic near the school.
entries.chinese: policeman = 男警察；男警察在学校附近指挥交通。

entries.sentence: The policewoman found the missing child.
entries.chinese: policewoman = 女警察；女警察找到了走失的孩子。

entries.sentence: The local politician answered questions about the new road.
entries.chinese: politician = 政治家；当地政治家回答了有关新道路的问题。
